analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of bun.sh/docs covered 313 of 315 requested pages (100% crawl coverage) with 91.5% overall confidence. Critical issues include 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links and 0% example reliability estimate across all pages. API reference coverage stands at 71.95% with 26 API pages detected. Freshness metadata is severely limited at 1.6% coverage, and SEO/geo issues affect 17.01% of pages.
strengths: No repository navigation link breakage (0 repo_broken_links_count)
API reference coverage exceeds 70% (71.95%) with successful detection across 26 pages
Zero crawl trap URLs encountered during site examination
risks: 0% example reliability estimate indicates code examples may be untested, outdated, or unvalidated
2 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation experience
Only 1.6% of pages display last-updated metadata, preventing users from assessing content freshness
17.01% SEO/geo issue rate may impact discoverability and search ranking
28.05% of API surface area lacks reference documentation coverage
No automated example validation detected across 313 pages
Freshness tracking infrastructure appears absent or non-functional

prioritized_actions.action: Implement automated example testing pipeline to validate all code samples against current Bun runtime
Fix 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links immediately
Deploy last-updated timestamp metadata to all 313 documentation pages
Audit and remediate SEO/geo issues affecting 17.01% of pages (approximately 53 pages)
Document remaining 28.05% of API surface area to achieve complete reference coverage

limitations: External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code examples, or API specifications
Example reliability estimate reflects detection of validation infrastructure only, not actual code correctness
Crawl limited to publicly accessible pages; authenticated or gated content not examined
API coverage detection may miss non-standard documentation patterns or embedded references
Cannot assess internal content review processes, subject matter expert validation, or editorial workflows
